channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tracy Shaw shares update after first day of chemotherapy following breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: Actress Tracy Shaw, best known for her role in Coronation Street, has shared an emotional update after completing her first full day of chemotherapy following a recent breast cancer diagnosis. The 52-...

item.title: Curated List of Recommended Movies to Stream Across Major Platforms This Month
item.description: This article from WIRED presents a curated selection of notable films available for streaming during the current month, highlighting a mix of new releases, genre films, and cult classics across major ...

item.title: Mail & Guardian Digital Edition access for 28–29 May 2026
item.description: The provided content is a webpage from the Mail & Guardian digital platform, specifically relating to the 28–29 May 2026 digital edition. Rather than presenting a traditional news article, the page fu...

item.title: Australians turn to extreme measures to cope with cost of living crisis as food insecurity rises
item.description: A Salvation Army report cited by SBS News reveals a sharp rise in food insecurity across Australia, with 4,400 Australians seeking emergency relief. Among the findings, 91% had skipped meals in the pa...

item.title: Pope Leo references Tolkien in encyclical on AI ethics and critiques tech industry power
item.description: Pope Leo XIV has drawn attention for referencing J.R.R. Tolkien in his first encyclical, Magnifica Humanitas, which focuses on safeguarding human dignity in the age of artificial intelligence. The doc...

item.title: Kyd Miller Duchovny Keeps a Private Life Despite Famous Hollywood Family
item.description: Kyd Miller Duchovny, the son of American actors David Duchovny and Téa Leoni, has continued to attract public interest despite living a very private life away from Hollywood fame. Born on June 15, 200...

item.title: Karnataka promotes fortified rice to address nutrient deficiencies
item.description: Karnataka’s Health and Family Welfare Minister, Dinesh Gundu Rao, has appealed to families to include fortified rice in their diets to ensure adequate intake of essential nutrients, improve immunity, ...

item.title: SARB increases repo rate to 7% amid rising oil prices and inflation concerns
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank (SARB) has increased the repo rate by 25 basis points to 7%, marking the first interest rate hike since 2023. Governor Lesetja Kganyago announced that the decision was d...

item.title: Most Grade 11 students nationwide struggle with reading comprehension, DepEd reports
item.description: A recent assessment by the Department of Education (DepEd) shows that 1.3 million out of 1.4 million Grade 11 students in the Philippines face difficulty in understanding what they read. According to ...

item.title: Nigeria moves to tighten border health measures amid renewed Ebola outbreak concerns in DR Congo
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria has begun considering stronger preventive measures, including possible flight restrictions and passenger isolation, following renewed concerns over an Ebola outbreak ...

item.title: Friends and collaborators recall Marilyn Monroe as warm, intelligent and deeply supportive
item.description: Published shortly before what would have been Marilyn Monroe’s 100th birthday, the article revisits the actress through the memories of friends, collaborators and contemporaries who knew her personall...

item.title: NMB Foundation and TACAIDS Launch Initiative to Reduce HIV Risk Among Tanzanian Girls
item.description: The NMB Foundation, working together with TACAIDS, has started a big initiative to protect young girls from HIV/AIDS in Tanzania. This partnership is important because adolescent girls are among the m...

item.title: Supreme Court refuses to hear appeal on Aboriginal title claim over privately owned land in New Brunswick
item.description: Canada’s Supreme Court has declined to hear an appeal from the Wolastoqey Nation in a legal dispute concerning Aboriginal title over privately owned land in New Brunswick. The decision effectively lea...

item.title: FSSAI Sends Notice to IRCTC Over Alleged Utensil Washing in Train Toilet
item.description: The Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) has taken suo motu cognisance of a viral social media video reportedly showing railway catering staff washing utensils inside the toilet area o...

item.title: KeNHA issues 30-day notice to remove illegal roadside traders along Kisii–Ahero Highway
item.description: The Kenya National Highways Authority (KeNHA) has issued a 30-day eviction notice targeting all illegal roadside traders and occupants along the Kisii–Ahero (A1) Highway, which connects Kisii, Homa Ba...

item.title: SIU freezes assets after alleged identity theft and corruption linked to Tembisa Hospital procurement fraud
item.description: The Special Investigating Unit (SIU) has obtained preservation orders to freeze assets linked to an alleged corruption and identity theft scheme tied to procurement fraud at Tembisa Hospital. The inve...

item.title: Israeli strikes kill newly appointed Hamas military leader and family in Gaza
item.description: Hamas has confirmed that Mohammed Odeh, the recently appointed head of its military wing, was killed in an Israeli airstrike in Gaza City, less than two weeks after his predecessor was also killed. Ac...

item.title: Antipolo Cathedral included in global Marian shrines for Pope Leo XIV’s rosary for peace
item.description: The Antipolo Cathedral in the Philippines has been selected as one of six major international Marian shrines that will take part in a global recitation of the Holy Rosary for peace led by Pope Leo XIV...

item.title: Budget priorities criticised amid disability funding cuts and ongoing dental care inequality in Australia
item.description: The article examines criticism of Australia’s federal budget priorities, arguing that people with disabilities have been disproportionately affected while broader public and media attention has focuse...

item.title: Authorities investigate North Hills family deaths as suspected murder-suicide involving mother
item.description: Los Angeles Police Department homicide detectives are investigating the deaths of four family members, including two adults and two young children, in a North Hills home in the San Fernando Valley as ...
